name: FTAL Quality Scoring
description: Multi-dimensional reply scoring (Faithfulness / Truthfulness / Accuracy / Latency) with optional teaching-context injection on retries.

hooks.notes: before_agent_finalize requires OpenClaw >= f3accc753c (#71765) and allowConversationAccess: true in plugin config. v1 behavior (agent_end + before_prompt_build) works on any OpenClaw >= 2026.4.0.
